# Yohaku Companion v1.7.8

## Fixes and reliability

- Fixed missing QQ Music playback links when the current song comes from radio or recommendation playback and is absent from `PlayingList.archive`.
- Added a read-only fallback to QQ Music's local song catalog so the current track can still be matched to its canonical song MID.
- Kept matching fail-closed by validating title, artist, album, duration, provider host, and ambiguous candidates before publishing a link.

## Privacy and compatibility

- The fallback opens the local database in read-only mode and uses a parameterized query; no player credential, remote search API, or additional environment variable is required.
- Playback links continue to activate only when Yohaku Core advertises the `mediaPlaybackLinks` capability introduced in Core v13.14.1.
